text: When you have completed bunkering operations, the hoses should be ___________ .

options.text: drained into drip pans or tanks
stowed with their ends open for venting
steam cleaned and flushed with hot water

explanation: After bunkering, hoses must be drained to prevent spillage from residual oil remaining in the line. Draining into drip trays or designated slop tanks ensures that the residual oil is contained and managed correctly.
